area_anchor: BRIK email pipeline deterministic migration with parity gates
current_truth: Email refinement still relies on externally rewritten text, and deterministic replacements need explicit parity protection.
next_scope_now: Add deterministic refinement mode with quality parity guard so migrated workloads cannot produce lower-quality output than current behavior.
evidence_refs: operator-stated: migrate deterministic workloads via lp-do-ideas -> lp-do-build with feature parity
why: Deterministic migration is only safe if each migrated workload proves it does not reduce draft quality or guardrail coverage compared with current behavior.

intended_outcome.statement: Deterministic refinement mode ships with built-in parity guard and tests that prevent quality regressions versus the current external-refinement path.
